creator: barbara.xxx1975@libero.it
text:
Update tucan to the last release.

Note:
I had to add a find+exec command in Makefile to change the mode for some files.
Those files are copied in ~/.tucan/plugins but the copied files should be writable as they could be updated when there is an update for a plugin.
During the install, those files are installed using ${COPYTREE_SHARE} but I was unable to find any other COPYTREE_* command using an appropriate *MODE in .mk files. Let me know if there is a more elegant solution, but please keep those files writable!

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
